domain: Yoruba Ifá divination system (UNESCO Intangible Heritage): 16 main Odù × 16 = 256 binary signatures; 8-bit binary encoding (4 vertical pairs of marks; single=1=open, double=0=closed); palm-nut Ikin ritual: babalawo counts 16 four-eyed nuts after transfer, 1 or 2 remaining encodes a bit; 8 rounds → 8-bit signature; babalawo memorizes corpus of proverbs+stories+ritual prescriptions per Odu; iyanifa female-priest variant
specific_mechanism: IFA-8-BIT-ODU-256-SIGNATURE-EVAL: 256-class evaluation diagnostic with (1) 8-bit binary signature S_8: model output evaluated on 8 binary axes A_1..A_8 (factuality, fluency, harm, reasoning, tone, format, constraint-adherence, citation) yielding 8-bit signature S = (b_1..b_8) ∈ {0,1}^8; (2) 256-verse corpus C_256: pre-built lookup of 256 prescribed rubric-interpretations + canonical example responses + ritual repair instructions; (3) palm-nut sample protocol: 8 independent low-cost binary judges per axis (16-judge cohort × 8 rounds); counter ≥ τ_thresh → bit=1 else 0; signature derived from 8 rounds of palm-nut-style sampling; (4) babalawo interpreter LLM L_baba: large evaluator LLM consumes (S_8, output, corpus_entry) → final assessment + ritual repair plan; (5) 16×16 compositional rubric tree: 256 = 16 main-Odu × 16 sub-Odu; each axis-pair (b_{2k-1}, b_{2k}) decoded as one of 4 sub-categories → 4-tuple → composite explanation tree. Differs from R506 NDERI-3-ELDER-JUDGE-TRIBUNAL-PRECEDENT (3-elder LLM judge tribunal + besa-oath confidence binding c_i amplified weighted-majority + precedent-case-base retrieval + retraction penalty calibration update verdict-divergence + nderi family-honor system-prompt-family stable identity tracking, no 8-bit signature + no 256-verse corpus + no palm-nut sampling + no 16×16 compositional tree) by 8-bit binary signature + 256-verse pre-built corpus + 8-round palm-nut sampling + babalawo interpreter LLM + 16×16 compositional rubric tree.
llm_application: IFA-8-BIT-ODU-256-SIGNATURE-EVAL 256-class evaluation diagnostic with 8-bit binary signature 8-axis evaluation factuality+fluency+harm+reasoning+tone+format+constraint+citation + 256-verse pre-built corpus lookup rubric-interpretation+canonical example+ritual repair + 8-round palm-nut protocol 16-judge cohort tau-threshold per axis + babalawo-interpreter LLM L_baba consumes S_8+output+corpus_entry final assessment+repair plan + 16×16 compositional rubric tree axis-pair sub-category. Differs from R359. R430. R445. R456. R466. R481. R494. R506 NDERI-3-ELDER (closest — 3-elder + besa-oath + precedent-base). Differs from Rubric-Based Evals + RRD Recursive Rubric + LLM-Rubric Multi-Dimensional + LLM-as-Judge IRT by 8-bit + 256-verse + palm-nut + babalawo + 16×16 compositional. Differs by 8-BIT BINARY SIGNATURE 8-AXIS + 256-VERSE CORPUS + 8-ROUND PALM-NUT PROTOCOL + BABALAWO INTERPRETER LLM + 16×16 COMPOSITIONAL RUBRIC TREE.
novelty_claim: Rubric-Based Evals 2026 + RRD Recursive Rubric Decomposition 2602.05125 + LLM-Rubric Microsoft + LLM-as-Judge IRT + Rubric Code-Eval ACM 2025 cover multi-rubric + decomposition + LLM-judge calibration space. IFA-8-BIT-ODU-256-SIGNATURE-EVAL adds (a) 8-bit binary signature 8-axis evaluation + (b) 256-verse pre-built corpus lookup + (c) 8-round palm-nut sampling protocol + (d) babalawo-interpreter LLM + (e) 16×16 compositional rubric tree. Recombination — borderline lookup.
